verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivit autem Josaphat cum patribus suis, et sepultus est cum eis in civitate David : regnavitque Joram filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב יְהוֹשָׁפָט֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקָּבֵ֥ר עִם־אֲבֹתָ֖יו בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֑יד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ יְהוֹרָ֥ם בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Josaphat slept with his fathers, and was buried with them in the city of David: and Joram his son reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josaphat nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin isäinsä tykö Davidin kaupunkiin. Ja hänen poikansa Joram tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: Now Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David. And Jehoram his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui habuit fratres filios Josaphat, Azariam, et Jahiel, et Zachariam, et Azariam, et Michaël, et Saphatiam : omnes hi filii Josaphat regis Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלוֹ־אַחִ֞ים בְּנֵ֣י יְהוֹשָׁפָ֗ט עֲזַרְיָ֤ה וִֽיחִיאֵל֙ וּזְכַרְיָ֣הוּ וַעֲזַרְיָ֔הוּ וּמִיכָאֵ֖ל וּשְׁפַטְיָ֑הוּ כׇּל־אֵ֕לֶּה בְּנֵ֖י יְהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he had brethren the sons of Josaphat, Azarias, and Jahiel, and Zacharias, and Azaria, and Michael, and Saphatias, all these were the sons of Josaphat king of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänellä oli veljiä Josaphatin poikia, Asaria, Jehiel, Sakaria, Asaria, Mikael ja Sephatia. Nämät kaikki olivat Josaphatin Israelin kuninkaan pojat.
verses.king_james: And he had brethren the sons of Jehoshaphat, Azariah, and Jehiel, and Zechariah, and Azariah, and Michael, and Shephatiah: all these were the sons of Jehoshaphat king of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deditque eis pater suus multa munera argenti et auri, et pensitationes, cum civitatibus munitissimis in Juda : regnum autem tradidit Joram, eo quod esset primogenitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָהֶ֣ם ׀ אֲ֠בִיהֶ֠ם מַתָּנ֨וֹת רַבּ֜וֹת לְכֶ֤סֶף וּלְזָהָב֙ וּלְמִגְדָּנ֔וֹת עִם־עָרֵ֥י מְצֻר֖וֹת בִּֽיהוּדָ֑ה וְאֶת־הַמַּמְלָכָ֛ה נָתַ֥ן לִֽיהוֹרָ֖ם כִּי־ה֥וּא הַבְּכֽוֹר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And their father gave them great gifts of silver, and of gold, and pensions, with strong cities in Juda: but the kingdom he gave to Joram, because he was the eldest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän isänsä antoi heille monta lahjaa hopiasta, kullasta ja kalliista kappaleista, vahvain Juudan kaupunkein kanssa. Mutta Joramille antoi hän valtakunnan; sillä hän oli esikoinen.
verses.king_james: And their father gave them great gifts of silver, and of gold, and of precious things, with fenced cities in Judah: but the kingdom gave he to Jehoram; because he was the firstborn.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexit ergo Joram super regnum patris sui : cumque se confirmasset, occidit omnes fratres suos gladio, et quosdam de principibus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨קׇם יְהוֹרָ֜ם עַל־מַמְלֶ֤כֶת אָבִיו֙ וַיִּתְחַזַּ֔ק וַיַּהֲרֹ֥ג אֶת־כׇּל־אֶחָ֖יו בֶּחָ֑רֶב וְגַ֖ם מִשָּׂרֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Joram rose up over the kingdom of his father: and when he had established himself, he slew all his brethren with the sword, and some of the princes of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Joram korotettiin isänsä valtakuntaan ja tuli voimalliseksi, tappoi hän kaikki veljensä miekalla ja muutamia Israelin ylimmäisistä.
verses.king_james: Now when Jehoram was risen up to the kingdom of his father, he strengthened himself, and slew all his brethren with the sword, and divers also of the princes of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Triginta duorum annorum erat Joram cum regnare cœpisset, et octo annis regnavit in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וּשְׁתַּ֛יִם שָׁנָ֖ה יְהוֹרָ֣ם בְּמׇלְכ֑וֹ וּשְׁמוֹנֶ֣ה שָׁנִ֔ים מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Joram was two and thirty years old when he began to reign: and he reigned eight years in Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joram oli kahden ajastajan vanha neljättäkymmentä tullessansa kuninkaaksi; ja hän hallitsi kahdeksan ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa,
verses.king_james: Jehoram was thirty and two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned eight years in Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ambulavitque in viis regum Israël, sicut egerat domus Achab : filia quippe Achab erat uxor ejus : et fecit malum in conspectu Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֜לֶךְ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ ׀ מַלְכֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר עָשׂוּ֙ בֵּ֣ית אַחְאָ֔ב כִּ֚י בַּת־אַחְאָ֔ב הָ֥יְתָה לּ֖וֹ אִשָּׁ֑ה וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he walked in the ways of the kings of Israel, as the house of Achab had done: for his wife was a daughter of Achab, and he did evil in the sight of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vaelsi Israelin kuningasten tiellä, niinkuin Ahabin huone teki; sillä Ahabin tytär oli hänen emäntänsä; ja hän teki pahaa Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: And he walked in the way of the kings of Israel, like as did the house of Ahab: for he had the daughter of Ahab to wife: and he wrought that which was evil in the eyes of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Noluit autem Dominus disperdere domum David propter pactum quod inierat cum eo : et quia promiserat ut daret ei lucernam, et filiis ejus omni tempore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־אָבָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֗ה לְהַשְׁחִית֙ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית דָּוִ֔יד לְמַ֣עַן הַבְּרִ֔ית אֲשֶׁ֥ר כָּרַ֖ת לְדָוִ֑יד וְכַאֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמַ֗ר לָתֵ֨ת ל֥וֹ נִ֛יר וּלְבָנָ֖יו כׇּל־הַיָּמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord would not destroy the house of David: because of the covenant which he had made with him: and because he had promised to give a lamp to him, and to his sons for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei Herra tahtonut hukuttaa Davidin huonetta, sen liiton tähden, jonka hän tehnyt oli Davidin kanssa, ja niinkuin hän puhunut oli antaaksensa hänelle ja hänen lapsillensa valkeuden joka aika.
verses.king_james: Howbeit the Lord would not destroy the house of David, because of the covenant that he had made with David, and as he promised to give a light to him and to his sons for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus illis rebellavit Edom, ne esset subditus Judæ, et constituit sibi regem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיָמָיו֙ פָּשַׁ֣ע אֱד֔וֹם מִתַּ֖חַת יַד־יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיַּמְלִ֥יכוּ עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מֶֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In those days Edom revolted, from being subject to Juda, and made themselves a king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen aikanansa luopuivat Edomilaiset Juudan vallan alta ja tekivät itsellensä kuninkaan.
verses.king_james: In his days the Edomites revolted from under the dominion of Judah, and made themselves a king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque transisset Joram cum principibus suis, et cuncto equitatu qui erat secum, surrexit nocte, et percussit Edom, qui se circumdederat, et omnes duces equitatus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲבֹ֤ר יְהוֹרָם֙ עִם־שָׂרָ֔יו וְכׇל־הָרֶ֖כֶב עִמּ֑וֹ וַֽיְהִי֙ קָ֣ם לַ֔יְלָה וַיַּ֗ךְ אֶת־אֱדוֹם֙ הַסּוֹבֵ֣ב אֵלָ֔יו וְאֵ֖ת שָׂרֵ֥י הָרָֽכֶב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joram went over with his princes, and all his cavalry with him, and rose in the night, and defeated the Edomites who had surrounded him, and all the captains of his cavalry.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Joram meni ylitse ylimmäistensä kanssa, ja kaikki vaunut hänen kanssansa; ja hän valmisti itsensä yöllä ja löi kaikki Edomilaiset ympäristöltänsä, ja myös vaunuin päämiehet.
verses.king_james: Then Jehoram went forth with his princes, and all his chariots with him: and he rose up by night, and smote the Edomites which compassed him in, and the captains of the chariots.

verses.latin_vulgate: Attamen rebellavit Edom, ne esset sub ditione Juda usque ad hanc diem : eo tempore et Lobna recessit ne esset sub manu illius. Dereliquerat enim Dominum Deum patrum suorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְשַׁ֨ע אֱד֜וֹם מִתַּ֣חַת יַד־יְהוּדָ֗ה עַ֚ד הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה אָ֣ז תִּפְשַׁ֥ע לִבְנָ֛ה בָּעֵ֥ת הַהִ֖יא מִתַּ֣חַת יָד֑וֹ כִּ֣י עָזַ֔ב אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י אֲבֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: However Edom revolted, from being under the dominion of Juda unto this day: at that time Lobna also revolted, from being under his hand. For he had forsaken the Lord the God of his fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Edomilaiset luopuivat Juudan vallan alta tähän päivään asti; silloin luopui myös Libna hänestä; sillä hän hylkäsi Herran isäinsä Jumalan.
verses.king_james: So the Edomites revolted from under the hand of Judah unto this day. The same time also did Libnah revolt from under his hand; because he had forsaken the Lord God of his fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: insuper et excelsa fabricatus est in urbibus Juda, et fornicari fecit habitatores Jerusalem, et prævaricari Judam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־ה֥וּא עָשָֽׂה־בָמ֖וֹת בְּהָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיֶּ֙זֶן֙ אֶת־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם וַיַּדַּ֖ח אֶת־יְהוּדָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover he built also high places in the cities of Juda, and he made the inhabitants of Jerusalem to commit fornication, and Juda to transgress.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki korkeuksia Juudan vuorilla, ja saatti Jerusalemin asuvaiset huorin tekemään ja vietteli Juudan.
verses.king_james: Moreover he made high places in the mountains of Judah, and caused the inhabitants of Jerusalem to commit fornication, and compelled Judah thereto.

verses.latin_vulgate: Allatæ sunt autem ei litteræ ab Elia propheta, in quibus scriptum erat : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus David patris tui : Quoniam non ambulasti in viis Josaphat patris tui, et in viis Asa regis Juda,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤א אֵלָיו֙ מִכְתָּ֔ב מֵאֵלִיָּ֥הוּ הַנָּבִ֖יא לֵאמֹ֑ר כֹּ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אֱלֹהֵי֙ דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֔יךָ תַּ֗חַת אֲשֶׁ֤ר לֹֽא־הָלַ֙כְתָּ֙ בְּדַרְכֵי֙ יְהוֹשָׁפָ֣ט אָבִ֔יךָ וּבְדַרְכֵ֖י אָסָ֥א מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there was a letter brought him from Eliseus the prophet, in which it was written: Thus saith the Lord the God of David thy father: Because thou hast not walked in the ways of Josaphat thy father nor in the ways of Asa king of Juda,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kirjoitus tuli hänelle Elialta prophetalta, joka näin oli: näin sanoo Herra sinun isäs Davidin Jumala: ettes vaeltanut isäs Josaphatin teillä, etkä Aksan Juudan kuninkaan teillä;
verses.king_james: And there came a writing to him from Elijah the prophet, saying, Thus saith the Lord God of David thy father, Because thou hast not walked in the ways of Jehoshaphat thy father, nor in the ways of Asa king of Judah,

verses.latin_vulgate: sed incessisti per iter regum Israël, et fornicari fecisti Judam et habitatores Jerusalem, imitatus fornicationem domus Achab, insuper et fratres tuos, domum patris tui, meliores te, occidisti :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֗לֶךְ בְּדֶ֙רֶךְ֙ מַלְכֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַתַּזְנֶ֤ה אֶת־יְהוּדָה֙ וְאֶת־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם כְּהַזְנ֖וֹת בֵּ֣ית אַחְאָ֑ב וְגַ֨ם אֶת־אַחֶ֧יךָ בֵית־אָבִ֛יךָ הַטּוֹבִ֥ים מִמְּךָ֖ הָרָֽגְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But hast walked in the ways of the kings of Israel, and hast made Juda and the inhabitants of Jerusalem to commit fornication, imitating the fornication of the house of Achab, moreover also thou hast killed thy brethren, the house of thy father, better men than thyself,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta vaellat Israelin kuningasten tiellä, ja saatat Juudan ja Jerusalemin asuvaiset huorin tekemään Ahabin huoneen huoruuden jälkeen, ja olet tappanut veljes isäs huoneesta, jotka sinua paremmat olivat;
verses.king_james: But hast walked in the way of the kings of Israel, and hast made Judah and the inhabitants of Jerusalem to go a whoring, like to the whoredoms of the house of Ahab, and also hast slain thy brethren of thy father’s house, which were better than thyself:

verses.latin_vulgate: ecce Dominus percutiet te plaga magna cum populo tuo, et filiis, et uxoribus tuis, universaque substantia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֗ה נֹגֵ֛ף מַגֵּפָ֥ה גְדוֹלָ֖ה בְּעַמֶּ֑ךָ וּבְבָנֶ֥יךָ וּבְנָשֶׁ֖יךָ וּבְכׇל־רְכוּשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold the Lord will strike thee with a great plague, with all thy people, and thy children, and thy wives, and all thy substance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, niin Herra lyö sinua kovin ja sinun kansaas, lapsias, emäntiäs ja kaikkea hyvyyttäs.
verses.king_james: Behold, with a great plague will the Lord smite thy people, and thy children, and thy wives, and all thy goods:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem ægrotabis pessimo languore uteri tui, donec egrediantur vitalia tua paulatim per singulos dies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֛ה בׇּחֳלָיִ֥ים רַבִּ֖ים בְּמַחֲלֵ֣ה מֵעֶ֑יךָ עַד־יֵצְא֤וּ מֵעֶ֙יךָ֙ מִן־הַחֹ֔לִי יָמִ֖ים עַל־יָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt be sick of a very grievous disease of thy bowels, till thy vital parts come out by little and little every day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun sisällyksissäs pitää oleman monta sairautta, siihenasti että sisällykses sinusta päivä päivältä sairauden tähden käyvät ulos.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt have great sickness by disease of thy bowels, until thy bowels fall out by reason of the sickness day by day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscitavit ergo Dominus contra Joram spiritum Philisthinorum, et Arabum qui confines sunt Æthiopibus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨עַר יְהֹוָ֜ה עַל־יְהוֹרָ֗ם אֵ֣ת ר֤וּחַ הַפְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ וְהָ֣עַרְבִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־יַ֥ד כּוּשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord stirred up against Joram the spirit of the Philistines, and of the Arabians, who border on the Ethiopians.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra herätti Joramia vastaan Philistealaisten ja Arabialaisten hengen, jotka ovat Etiopialaisten tykönä.
verses.king_james: Moreover the Lord stirred up against Jehoram the spirit of the Philistines, and of the Arabians, that were near the Ethiopians:

verses.latin_vulgate: et ascenderunt in terram Juda, et vastaverunt eam, diripueruntque cunctam substantiam quæ inventa est in domo regis, insuper et filios ejus, et uxores : nec remansit ei filius, nisi Joachaz, qui minimus natu erat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲל֤וּ בִיהוּדָה֙ וַיִּבְקָע֔וּהָ וַיִּשְׁבּ֗וּ אֵ֤ת כׇּל־הָרְכוּשׁ֙ הַנִּמְצָ֣א לְבֵית־הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וְגַם־בָּנָ֖יו וְנָשָׁ֑יו וְלֹ֤א נִשְׁאַר־לוֹ֙ בֵּ֔ן כִּ֥י אִם־יְהוֹאָחָ֖ז קְטֹ֥ן בָּנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they came up into the land of Juda, and wasted it, and they carried away all the substance that was found in the king's house, his sons also, and his wives: so that there was no son left him but Joachaz, who was the youngest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he menivät ylös Juudaan, ja hävittivät sen ja veivät pois kaiken kalun, joka kuninkaan huoneessa oli, niin myös hänen poikansa ja emäntänsä; niin ettei hänelle yhtään poikaa jäänyt, paitsi Joahasta nuorinta poikaansa.
verses.king_james: And they came up into Judah, and brake into it, and carried away all the substance that was found in the king’s house, and his sons also, and his wives; so that there was never a son left him, save Jehoahaz, the youngest of his sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et super hæc omnia percussit eum Dominus alvi languore insanabili.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרֵ֖י כׇּל־זֹ֑את נְגָפ֨וֹ יְהֹוָ֧ה ׀ בְּמֵעָ֛יו לׇחֳלִ֖י לְאֵ֥ין מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And besides all this the Lord struck him with an incurable disease in his bowels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaiken sen jälkeen rankaisi Herra häntä hänen sisällyksissänsä senkaltaisella taudilla, jota ei taidettu parantaa.
verses.king_james: And after all this the Lord smote him in his bowels with an incurable disease.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque diei succederet dies, et temporum spatia volverentur, duorum annorum expletus est circulus : et sic longa consumptus tabe, ita ut egereret etiam viscera sua, languore pariter, et vita caruit. Mortuusque est in infirmitate pessima, et non fecit ei populus secundum morem combustionis exequias, sicut fecerat majoribus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י לְיָמִ֣ים ׀ מִיָּמִ֡ים וּכְעֵת֩ צֵ֨את הַקֵּ֜ץ לְיָמִ֣ים ׀ שְׁנַ֗יִם יָצְא֤וּ מֵעָיו֙ עִם־חׇלְי֔וֹ וַיָּ֖מׇת בְּתַחֲלֻאִ֣ים רָעִ֑ים וְלֹא־עָ֨שׂוּ ל֥וֹ עַמּ֛וֹ שְׂרֵפָ֖ה כִּשְׂרֵפַ֥ת אֲבֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as day came after day, and time rolled on, two whole years passed: then after being wasted with a long consumption, so as to void his very bowels, his disease ended with his life. And he died of a most wretched illness, and the people did not make a funeral for him according to the manner of burning, as they had done for his ancestors.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se tapahtui päivä päivältä, siihenasti kuin kahden vuoden aika kulunut oli, että hänen sisällyksensä kävivät ulos hänestä, hänen tautinsa kanssa; ja hän kuoli pahoista taudeista. Ja he ei tehneet yhtään suitsutusta hänelle, niin kuin he olivat tehneet hänen esi-isillensä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that in process of time, after the end of two years, his bowels fell out by reason of his sickness: so he died of sore diseases. And his people made no burning for him, like the burning of his fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Triginta duorum annorum fuit cum regnare cœpisset, et octo annis regnavit in Jerusalem. Ambulavitque non recte, et sepelierunt eum in civitate David, verumtamen non in sepulchro regum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וּשְׁתַּ֙יִם֙ הָיָ֣ה בְמׇלְכ֔וֹ וּשְׁמוֹנֶ֣ה שָׁנִ֔ים מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ בְּלֹ֣א חֶמְדָּ֔ה וַֽיִּקְבְּרֻ֙הוּ֙ בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֔יד וְלֹ֖א בְּקִבְר֥וֹת הַמְּלָכִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was two and thirty years old when he began his reign, and he reigned eight years in Jerusalem. And he walked not rightly, and they buried him in the city of David: but not in the sepulchres of the kings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän oli kahden ajastajan vanha neljättäkymmentä tullessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kahdeksan ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa, ja vaelsi kelvottomasti; ja he hautasivat hänen Davidin kaupunkiin, mutta ei kuningasten hautain sekaan.
verses.king_james: Thirty and two years old was he when he began to reign, and he reigned in Jerusalem eight years, and departed without being desired. Howbeit they buried him in the city of David, but not in the sepulchres of the kings.
